description: Hot100.ai is a community-driven site that showcases and ranks AI-built projects, with weekly charts, project discovery, and submission workflows. It also makes project ranking and discovery data available to external applications and AI assistants.
summary: Hot100.ai exposes a public HTTP API for project/ranking data plus a public unauthenticated MCP server at `https://www.hot100.ai/mcp`; no GraphQL API or CLI was found.
